# neo website: design

As you hopefully noticed, the v1.3 release including the new project website is online.

The Blog Post is here:
https://itnext.io/creating-a-responsive-multithreading-website-for-desktop-mobile-8da990ae5bf3?source=friends_link&sk=91bf4b80d62944d54ac28d23d0ca9be3

The video showing the transitions:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXezmaIocKQ

The online version:
https://neomjs.github.io/pages/node_modules/neo.mjs/dist/production/apps/website/index.html#mainview=blog

I do like the preview items and the transitions when changing the resolutions (width) a lot.

It is kind of obvious though, that I am most definitely not a professional designer :)

So, if anyone of you wants to contribute on this part, it would definitely be appreciated.

You don't need to apply changes to the real App (unless you want to).

Use the tools you like best and I can apply the changes on my own.

**In case someone does create a new Website Design which will get used, I will add a "Website Design sponsored by XY" into the main repo readme (sponsors section at the top).**

Thx & best regards,
Tobias
